title: Scalable Survey Analytics with Interactive Dashboards
excerpt: A research-focused organization analyzed complex survey data in Excel, leading to manual errors, slow analysis, and limited ability to compare results across clients and time periods.

seo.title: Scalable Survey Analytics with Interactive Dashboards
seo.description: A research-focused organization analyzed complex survey data in Excel, leading to manual errors, slow analysis, and limited ability to compare results across clients and time periods.

challenge: A research-focused organization analyzed complex survey data in Excel, leading to manual errors, slow analysis, and limited ability to compare results across clients and time periods.
whatWeDid: Centralized survey data, automated statistical calculations, and built interactive dashboards with dynamic filtering and time-based visualizations.
outcome: Faster analysis, improved accuracy, and scalable insights across multiple datasets without reliance on spreadsheets.
